title: Structure-Based Virtual Screening of Natural Product-Derived Inhibitors Targeting Rv3806c in the Decaprenylphosphoryl-d-Arabinose Biosynthetic Pathway of.
snippet: Phosphoribosyl transferase (Rv3806c) is a key enzyme in. It is involved in the biosynthesis of decaprenylphosphoryl arabinofuranose, which is the sole donor of arabinofuranose residues in the biosynthesis of arabinogalactan and lipoarabinomannan. Inhibition of Rv3806c disrupts cell wall assembly, making it an attractive target for anti-tuberculosis drug dev...
